# Lingjing Persona Schema Context Repository

This repository hosts the official JSON-LD schema vocabularies and context files for the **Verifiable Persona Claims (VPC)** standard. 

By utilizing GitHub Pages with a custom domain, standard-compliant verifiers (such as schools, games, or work platforms) can fetch and resolve the context at:
`https://lingjing-persona.org/schema/persona/v1.jsonld`

---

## Auto-Generated Files
This directory is automatically synchronized from the `@persona/core` package workspace during compilation. Do not edit files here manually.

---

## Deployment Steps
1. Push this directory to your GitHub repository: `git@github.com:lingjing-persona/schema.git`
2. Set up Custom Domain in GitHub Pages settings to `lingjing-persona.org`.
3. Map CNAME in DNS settings to `lingjing-persona.github.io`.
